title: Living in Boulder vlog 12 - 1 - 2018: New Streaming Channel: Kyle Pounds Streaming

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual life update from Boulder, covering a rough few days of heavy weed use, 60-mile bike rides, insomnia, and computer/streaming troubles. He announces he is launching a separate YouTube channel called 'Kyle Pounds Streaming' to keep livestreams off his main channel, which lost about 35 subscribers from recent streams. He also mentions his car breaking down, a gas leak, and working on his website and research into the Talmud and a Roman directory from 354 AD.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: streaming clogs up the main channel feed and drives away subscribers; better to keep them on separate channels
prefers pushing until he cracks — sees it as being in his element, analogous to his old life as a stoner web designer
will not drive it again until the gas leak is fixed, willing to wait about a month

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He decided to get a splitter for his ethernet cable because his computer setup changes based on whether he's doing big screen or bicycle activities.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His car broke down; the battery died and the starter wouldn't start.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Luckily, his brother was in the area and jumped his car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There's a gas leak on the back where his motor is, so he's not going to drive it again until he gets that fixed, planning to wait like a month.

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He thinks he's done buying stuff but acknowledges you always need to buy a few more things.

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He lost a bunch of subscribers, down to 47.75 from 48.10, losing 35 subscribers just from streaming in a couple days.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His new streaming channel is called Kyle Pound Streaming, and he encourages people to subscribe.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He thinks he's going to have to get something to eat.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: This morning, he did the drive-through at Taco Bell with his van for the first time, but they only had breakfast stuff like a breakfast burrito with sausages.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He announces no more streaming on this channel; only talking on this channel and the other channels for streaming.

Till I crack. It's kind of like in my element. Being a transition to an athlete from being

To drive it again until I get that fixed. I'm going to wait like a month for that. But yeah,
But I didn't even need it because then I found an ethernet cable here. But I got, yeah. So,
I think it was the same length too. So, I thought I looked. But anyways, yeah. So, hopefully I'm done
Buying stuff. But yeah, it's weird. I thought I was set up before, but then you always need to buy
A few more things. So, yeah. I think I'm going to start a new streaming channel though. I'm going to
Stream on a different channel. I'll have one channel where I make serious talking videos
Like this and then I'll have another channel where I stream because when you're streaming,
I think it shows like right at the top and it gets in the way of people's view and it's annoying.
It's better to start a new channel just for the streaming. That's different because you're not
Talking totally different kind of channels. So, plus I lost a bunch of subscribers. I'm down to 47.75
And I was at like 48.10 when I started. So, 35 subscribers just from the streaming in a
Couple days. So, yeah. If you want to check out my streaming, I'll put the link down below. It's

Breakfast stuff. They had this breakfast burrito, sausages, kind of whatever. So, anyways,
That's me. No more streaming on this channel. Only talking on this channel and the other channels
For the streaming. Okay. Peace out.
